source.body_text_sample:
OPPORTUNITIES
CAREERS

Why Safehaven?

Whether you’re a seasoned professional or just starting your career, we offer a wide range of roles and fields to explore.

JOIN OUR TEAM

At Safehaven, we lead the sector in delivering exceptional, life-changing support for children and youth with complex medical needs. No one else does what we do. Joining our team means becoming part of something extraordinary: a community of passionate professionals who are driven to give every child the chance to live their fullest, most joyful life.

Here, your work transforms futures - including your own.

If you are dedicated, compassionate and ready to be part of a purpose-driven organization where your impact matters every single day, Safehaven is where your career can truly thrive.

Explore Careers

PLACEMENT OPPORTUNITIES

Elevate Your Impact:
Student Placements at Safehaven.

We believe in nurturing the next generation of changemakers - students who are driven by purpose and passionate about making a difference.

Our student placements go far beyond skill development. Through hands-on experience, you'll become part of a team that delivers exceptional care to individuals with complex medical needs.

PLACEMENTS WE OFFER
Developmental Services Worker

We work together to help each other and our  clients in challenging times.

APPLICATION FORM

If you are interested in our placement programs, please submit your completed application form to:  

hr@safehaven.to

Download

Download Application
